Free Family Fun Day at Prospect Park

06/15/2026
10:00 am - 3:00 pm ET
Age: 2-12

Join us for a day of free family activities including face painting, live music, crafts, and nature walks. Perfect for kids of all ages! Bring a picnic blanket and enjoy the sunshine.

Activities include:

  • Face painting station
  • Live music performances
  • Arts and crafts tables
  • Guided nature walks
Prospect Park Bandshell, Brooklyn, NY
